src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/config.general_idea: Register Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace in Jackson serialization for Hibernate entities.
Update import for GroupedOpenApi to reflect package restructuring in newer SpringDoc OpenAPI versions.

src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Replace javax.persistence and javax.validation imports with jakarta equivalents required for Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+.
Remove firstName and lastName fields, consolidating user identity into a single 'name' field inherited from NamedEntity.
src/main/java/ru/javaops/bootjava/model/.human_impl: Removed @Column(name = "first_name") ... private String firstName; and lastName fields.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.7 to 3.2.0 to align with Java 21 and Spring Framework 6.
Set the target Java version to 21 to match the migration goal.
Upgrade springdoc-openapi version to 2.3.0 which is compatible with Spring Boot 3.
Remove spring-boot-starter-data-rest as part of refactoring away from HATEOAS data rest.
Replace legacy springdoc modules with the unified starter for Spring Boot 3.
Add Jackson Hibernate5 Jakarta datatype to handle Hibernate types in Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE).
